---
title: "Site contents"
---

Guided list of key pages on this site. For the full generated API surface, use the [API index](reference/index.qmd).

## Home

- [CDMConnector](index.qmd) — package overview, install, quick example

## Tutorials

- [Notebooks overview](notebooks/index.qmd)
- [Database connection examples](tutorials/database_connection_examples.qmd)
- [00 — Welcome / first CDM](notebooks/00_welcome_your_first_cdm.ipynb)
- [01 — Lazy queries and pipelines](notebooks/01_lazy_queries_and_pipelines.ipynb)
- [02 — Understanding OMOP people & time domains](notebooks/02_understanding_omop_people_time_domains.ipynb)
- [03 — Story GiBleed end to end](notebooks/03_story_gibleed_end_to_end.ipynb)
- [04 — Measurement distributions with guardrails](notebooks/04_measurement_distributions_with_guardrails.ipynb)
- [05 — Cohorts 101: tables, attrition, counts](notebooks/05_cohorts_101_tables_attrition_counts.ipynb)
- [06 — Cohorts from JSON / Circe Atlas](notebooks/06_cohorts_from_json_circe_atlas.ipynb)
- [07 — Cohort characterization / Table 1](notebooks/07_cohort_characterization_table1.ipynb)
- [08 — Performance, pushdown, materialization](notebooks/08_performance_pushdown_and_materialization.ipynb)
- [09 — Exporting results and tables](notebooks/09_exporting_results_and_tables.ipynb)
- [10 — Pedagogical OMOP (GiBleed)](notebooks/10_pedagogical_omop_gibleed.qmd)

## Reference (API)

- [API index](reference/index.qmd)

### CDM & connection

- [Cdm](reference/Cdm.qmd)
- [cdm_from_con](reference/cdm_from_con.qmd)
- [cdm_from_tables](reference/cdm_from_tables.qmd)
- [cdm_tables](reference/cdm_tables.qmd)
- [collect](reference/collect.qmd)
- [compute](reference/compute.qmd)
- [insert_table](reference/insert_table.qmd)
- [drop_table](reference/drop_table.qmd)

### Cohorts

- [generate_cohort_set](reference/generate_cohort_set.qmd)

### Eunomia

- [download_eunomia_data](reference/download_eunomia_data.qmd)
- [eunomia_dir](reference/eunomia_dir.qmd)
- [eunomia_is_available](reference/eunomia_is_available.qmd)
- [example_datasets](reference/example_datasets.qmd)
- [require_eunomia](reference/require_eunomia.qmd)

### Patient profiles

- [add_age](reference/add_age.qmd)
- [add_demographics](reference/add_demographics.qmd)
- [add_sex](reference/add_sex.qmd)

### Cohort characteristics

- [SummarisedResult](reference/SummarisedResult.qmd)
- [summarise_characteristics](reference/summarise_characteristics.qmd)
- [summarise_cohort_count](reference/summarise_cohort_count.qmd)
- [summarise_large_scale_characteristics](reference/summarise_large_scale_characteristics.qmd)
- [table_characteristics](reference/table_characteristics.qmd)

### Visualisation

- [vis_omop_table](reference/vis_omop_table.qmd)
- [vis_table](reference/vis_table.qmd)
- [bar_plot](reference/bar_plot.qmd)
- [box_plot](reference/box_plot.qmd)
- [scatter_plot](reference/scatter_plot.qmd)

### Results

- [Result](reference/Result.qmd)

### Exceptions

- [CDMConnectorError](reference/CDMConnectorError.qmd)
- [CDMValidationError](reference/CDMValidationError.qmd)
- [CohortError](reference/CohortError.qmd)
- [EunomiaError](reference/EunomiaError.qmd)
- [SourceError](reference/SourceError.qmd)
- [TableNotFoundError](reference/TableNotFoundError.qmd)

## Contributing

- [Contributing](contributing.qmd)
- [Development](development.qmd)
